ngsmisc 0.2.0
  • Reference

    Calculate RPM/RPKM/TPM from featureCounts read counts

    fC_calc.Rd

    fC_calc_rpm(tbl_fC)

fC_calc_rpkm(tbl_fC)

fC_calc_tpm(tbl_fC)

    Arguments

    tbl_fC

    featureCounts read counts tibble

    Examples

    infs <-
  system.file(package = "ngsmisc") %>%
  fs::dir_ls(regexp = "_gene_counts.txt$")

lapply(infs, fC_read_count) %>%
  fC_merge_tbl_li() %>%
  fC_rename_col(col_fpath = -c(1:6)) %>%
  fC_calc_rpm() %>%
  fC_calc_rpkm() %>%
  fC_calc_tpm() %>%
  dplyr::glimpse()
#> Rows: 133
#> Columns: 18
#> $ Geneid        <chr> "ATCG00010", "ATCG00020", "ATCG00030", "ATCG00040", "ATC…
#> $ Chr           <chr> "ChrC", "ChrC", "ChrC;ChrC", "ChrC", "ChrC;ChrC", "ChrC"…
#> $ Start         <chr> "4", "383", "1717;4312", "2056", "5084;6149", "6616", "7…
#> $ End           <chr> "76", "1444", "1751;4347", "3636", "5283;6188", "6687", …
#> $ Strand        <chr> "-", "-", "-;-", "-", "-;-", "-", "+", "+", "+", "+;+", …
#> $ Length        <int> 73, 1062, 71, 1581, 240, 72, 186, 111, 88, 73, 72, 1524,…
#> $ sample_1      <int> 332, 102, 137, 222, 96, 31, 1998, 1, 980, 251, 3113386, …
#> $ sample_2      <int> 293, 97, 137, 234, 91, 50, 1824, 14, 943, 224, 3356663, …
#> $ sample_3      <int> 97, 53, 68, 60, 40, 20, 651, 0, 184, 63, 4453752, 166, 3…
#> $ rpm_sample_1  <dbl> 3.494239e+01, 1.073531e+01, 1.441900e+01, 2.336509e+01, …
#> $ rpm_sample_2  <dbl> 2.839144e+01, 9.399215e+00, 1.327518e+01, 2.267439e+01, …
#> $ rpm_sample_3  <dbl> 7.000186e+00, 3.824844e+00, 4.907347e+00, 4.330012e+00, …
#> $ rpkm_sample_1 <dbl> 4.786629e+02, 1.010858e+01, 2.030845e+02, 1.477868e+01, …
#> $ rpkm_sample_2 <dbl> 3.889239e+02, 8.850485e+00, 1.869744e+02, 1.434181e+01, …
#> $ rpkm_sample_3 <dbl> 9.589296e+01, 3.601548e+00, 6.911756e+01, 2.738780e+00, …
#> $ tpm_sample_1  <dbl> 7.815872e+01, 1.650585e+00, 3.316076e+01, 2.413144e+00, …
#> $ tpm_sample_2  <dbl> 6.368434e+01, 1.449223e+00, 3.061612e+01, 2.348399e+00, …
#> $ tpm_sample_3  <dbl> 1.576913e+01, 5.922571e-01, 1.136605e+01, 4.503792e-01, …
